description: LIC India is the public website for Life Insurance Corporation of India, providing information about insurance products, customer services, and access to customer and business portals. The site also publishes notices and tenders related to LIC operations.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found on licindia.in itself; the site appears to be a public insurance website and portal, while the only discovered API documentation points to a separate host under apisetu.gov.in, which is out of scope for licindia.in.
